label: JsonStore
peekOfCode:
class JsonStore:
    """
    Single source of truth for the in-memory data.
    Attributes are plain dicts indexed by primary key (_id)
    or by common foreign-key lookups, so every repository
    operation is an O(1) or O(n-results) lookup.
    """
    def __init__(self, path: str | Path) -> None:
        self._path = Path(path)
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

mock_data_path
peekOfCode:
def mock_data_path():
    """
    Create a temp copy of mock_data.json so tests don't mutate
    the real file.  Yields the temp path, cleans up after.
    """
    src = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "mock_data.json"
    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(
        suffix=".json", delete=False,
    )
    shutil.copy(src, tmp.name)
